hooks.command: input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); tool=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_name'); if { [[ "$file" == *.swift ]] && [[ "$tool" == "Write" ]]; } || [[ "$file" == *project.yml ]]; then cd /Users/ilia/Code/swift/FitnesApp && /opt/homebrew/bin/xcodegen generate 2>&1; fi

cd /Users/ilia/Code/swift/FitnesApp && output=$(/opt/homebrew/bin/swiftlint --strict --quiet 2>&1); [ -n "$output" ] && jq -Rn --arg o "$output" '{"systemMessage":("SwiftLint --strict violations:\n" + $o)}' || true

cd /Users/ilia/Code/swift/FitnesApp && output=$(/opt/homebrew/bin/swiftlint --strict --quiet 2>&1); [ -n "$output" ] && jq -Rn --arg o "$output" '{"systemMessage":("SwiftLint --strict violations:\n" + $o)}' || true
